author: anon-13168fa2
content: Decision: Placing this as 02-the-methodology/01-how-we-build.md rather than squeezing it into Phase 0 or Phase 1. Reason: the existing phases teach general agent skills. The methodology is the next step up - now that you can talk to agents and build things, here's the discipline that makes the output actually good. This also gives room for future methodology chapters (adversarial prompting deep-dive, formal verification intro, etc).
